title: Fyno Notification Event
description: Schema for firing a notification event via the Fyno REST API. At least one of distinct_id or to must be provided.

event.description: The name of the notification event configured in your Fyno account.

distinct_id.description: Unique identifier for the user whose profile channels will be used for delivery.

to.description: Explicit destination channel addresses. Overrides profile channel data when distinct_id is also supplied.

sms.description: Phone number in E.164 format for SMS delivery.

whatsapp.description: Phone number in E.164 format for WhatsApp delivery.

voice.description: Phone number for voice call delivery.

data.description: Template variable data used to populate notification content.

callback.description: Optional webhook callback configuration for delivery status updates.

url.description: URL to POST delivery status updates to.

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to send with the callback request.

idempotency_key.description: Optional key to prevent duplicate event processing.
